page.name: Cues and Stems

pad1.name: `var 'hc_but4' 3 ? cue_display 13 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? cue_display 9 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? cue_display 5 : cue_display 1`

page.pad1: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? hot_cue 13 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? hot_cue 9 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? hot_cue 5 : hot_cue 1

pad2.name: `var 'hc_but4' 3 ? cue_display 14 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? cue_display 10 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? cue_display 6 : cue_display 2`

page.pad2: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? hot_cue 14 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? hot_cue 10 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? hot_cue 6 : hot_cue 2

pad3.name: `var 'hc_but4' 3 ? cue_display 15 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? cue_display 11 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? cue_display 7 : cue_display 3`

page.pad3: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? hot_cue 15 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? hot_cue 11 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? hot_cue 7 : hot_cue 3

pad4.name: `var 'hc_but4' 3 ? cue_display 16 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? cue_display 12 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? cue_display 8 : cue_display 4`

page.pad4: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? hot_cue 16 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? hot_cue 12 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? hot_cue 8 : hot_cue 4

pad5.name: `var 'stem_page' 1 ? get_text 'Voc Echo' : var 'stem_page' 0 ? var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Acapella' : get_text '🎤' : var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Vocal' : get_text '🎤'`

page.pad5: var 'stem_page' 1 ? var 'pad_fx_sngl' 1 ? padfx_single 'echo out' 80% 1bt 'stemfx:vocal' smart_pressed : padfx 'echo out' 80% 1bt 'stemfx:vocal' smart_pressed : var 'stem_page' 0 ? stem_pad 'acapella' smart_pressed : stem_pad 'vocal' smart_pressed

pad6.name: `var 'stem_page' 1 ? get_text 'Voc Reverb' : var 'stem_page' 0 ? var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Instrumental' : get_text '🎹 🎸 🥁' : var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Melody' : get_text '🎹'`

page.pad6: var 'stem_page' 1 ? var 'pad_fx_sngl' 1 ? padfx_single 'Reverb' 80% 'stemfx:vocal' smart_pressed : padfx 'Reverb' 80% 'stemfx:vocal' smart_pressed : var 'stem_page' 0 ? stem_pad 'instrumental' smart_pressed : stem_pad 'instru' smart_pressed

pad7.name: `var 'stem_page' 1 ? get_text 'Instr BtGrid' : var 'stem_page' 0 ? var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Vocal & Drums' : get_text '🎤 🥁' : var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Bass' : get_text '🎸'`

page.pad7: var 'stem_page' 1 ? var 'pad_fx_sngl' 1 ? padfx_single 'Beat Grid' 'stemfx:MeloRhythm' smart_pressed : padfx 'Beat Grid' 'stemfx:MeloRhythm' smart_pressed : var 'stem_page' 0 ? stem_pad isolate 'kick' & stem_pad isolate 'hihat' & stem_pad isolate 'vocal' smart_pressed : stem_pad 'bass' smart_pressed

pad8.name: `var 'stem_page' 1 ? get_text 'Instr Echo' : var 'stem_page' 0 ? effect_stems : var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Drums' : get_text '🥁'`

page.pad8: var 'stem_page' 1 ? var 'pad_fx_sngl' 1 ? padfx_single 'echo out' 80% 1bt 'stemfx:MeloRhythm' smart_pressed : padfx 'echo out' 80% 1bt 'stemfx:MeloRhythm' smart_pressed : var 'stem_page' 0 ? effect_stems +1 : stem_pad 'rhythm' smart_pressed

shift_pad1.name: `var 'hc_but4' 3 ? get_text '13 Del' : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? get_text '9 Del' : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? get_text '5 Del' : get_text '1 Del'`
shift_pad1.color: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? cue_color 13 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? cue_color 9 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? cue_color 5 : cue_color 1

page.shift_pad1: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? delete_cue 13 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? delete_cue 9 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? delete_cue 5 : delete_cue 1

shift_pad2.name: `var 'hc_but4' 3 ? get_text '14 Del' : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? get_text '10 Del' : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? get_text '6 Del' : get_text '2 Del'`
shift_pad2.color: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? cue_color 14 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? cue_color 10 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? cue_color 6 : cue_color 2

page.shift_pad2: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? delete_cue 14 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? delete_cue 10 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? delete_cue 6 : delete_cue 2

shift_pad3.name: `var 'hc_but4' 3 ? get_text '15 Del' : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? get_text '11 Del' : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? get_text '7 Del' : get_text '3 Del'`
shift_pad3.color: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? cue_color 15 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? cue_color 11 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? cue_color 7 : cue_color 3

page.shift_pad3: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? delete_cue 15 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? delete_cue 11 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? delete_cue 7 : delete_cue 3

shift_pad4.name: `var 'hc_but4' 3 ? get_text '16 Del' : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? get_text '12 Del' : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? get_text '8 Del' : get_text '4 Del'`
shift_pad4.color: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? cue_color 16 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? cue_color 12 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? cue_color 8 : cue_color 4

page.shift_pad4: var 'hc_but4' 3 ? delete_cue 16 : var 'hc_but4' 2 ? delete_cue 12 : var 'hc_but4' 1 ? delete_cue 8 : delete_cue 4

shift_pad5.name: `var 'stem_page' 1 ? get_text 'Voc Echo' : var 'stem_page' 0 ? var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Acapella' : get_text '🎤' : var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Vocal' : get_text '🎤'`

page.shift_pad5: var 'stem_page' 1 ? var 'pad_fx_sngl' 1 ? padfx_single 'echo out' 80% 1bt 'stemfx:vocal' smart_pressed : padfx 'echo out' 80% 1bt 'stemfx:vocal' smart_pressed : var 'stem_page' 0 ? stem_pad 'acapella' smart_pressed : stem_pad 'vocal' smart_pressed

shift_pad6.name: `var 'stem_page' 1 ? get_text 'Voc Reverb' : var 'stem_page' 0 ? var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Instrumental' : get_text '🎹 🎸 🥁' : var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Melody' : get_text '🎹'`

page.shift_pad6: var 'stem_page' 1 ? var 'pad_fx_sngl' 1 ? padfx_single 'Reverb' 80% 'stemfx:vocal' smart_pressed : padfx 'Reverb' 80% 'stemfx:vocal' smart_pressed : var 'stem_page' 0 ? stem_pad 'instrumental' smart_pressed : stem_pad 'instru' smart_pressed

shift_pad7.name: `var 'stem_page' 1 ? get_text 'Instr BtGrid' : var 'stem_page' 0 ? var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Vocal & Drums' : get_text '🎤 🥁' : var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Bass' : get_text '🎸'`

shift_pad8.name: `var 'stem_page' 1 ? get_text 'Instr Echo' : var 'stem_page' 0 ? effect_stems : var 'stemsfx_text' 0 ? get_text 'Drums' : get_text '🥁'`

page.shift_pad8: var 'stem_page' 1 ? var 'pad_fx_sngl' 1 ? padfx_single 'echo out' 80% 1bt 'stemfx:MeloRhythm' smart_pressed : padfx 'echo out' 80% 1bt 'stemfx:MeloRhythm' smart_pressed : var 'stem_page' 0 ? effect_stems +1 : stem_pad 'rhythm' smart_pressed
page.param1: param_smaller 0 ? var_equal 'hc_but4' 0 ? nothing : cycle 'hc_but4' -4 : var_equal 'hc_but4' 3 ? nothing : cycle 'hc_but4' +4
page.param2: has_stems '1.0' ? holding ? param_bigger 0 ? cycle 'stem_page' 3 : cycle 'stem_page' -3 : stems_bleed : param_bigger 0 ? cycle 'stem_page' 3 : cycle 'stem_page' -3
page.menu: --CUES Edit CUEs and POIs... =[edit_poi] Read-only (Lock) +[lock_cues] Smart Cue +[smart_cue] Quantize on Set +[quantize_setcue] Display mode >> Cue number +[cue_display 'number'] Display mode >> Name +[cue_display 'name'] Display mode >> Time Pos +[cue_display 'position'] Display mode >> Time left +[cue_display 'distance'] Display mode >> Beats left +[cue_display 'beat'] --STEMS Show Icons +[toggle 'stemsfx_text'] Pad Fx's Single +[toggle 'pad_fx_sngl'] Effect Show Gui >> Vocal echo out +[effect_show_gui "vocals" "echo out"] Effect Show Gui >> Vocal reverb +[effect_show_gui "vocals" "Reverb"] Effect Show Gui >> Beat Grid Pattern Instrumental +[effect_show_gui "instrumental" "Beat Grid"] Effect Show Gui >> Instrumental echo out +[effect_show_gui "instrumental" "echo out"]
